entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of crop per unit area.

entities.description: A method of evaluating plant traits in a field environment.

entities.name: POT SCREENING
entities.description: A method of evaluating plant traits in pots.

entities.name: LABORATORY SCREENING
entities.description: A method of evaluating plant traits in a laboratory setting.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional tools used for crop improvement and trait incorporation.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL TOOLS
entities.description: Modern scientific tools used for genetic modification and trait incorporation.

entities.name: WATER LIMITING ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by a lack of sufficient water for crop growth.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of crops through agricultural practices to handle water limitations.

entities.name: GENETIC MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of crops through genetic improvement to handle water limitations.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources of a species used for breeding.
